message:
chore(artifacts): publish verification evidence for benchmark spec, flamegraph, GA delegate, governance, metamorphic, one-lever, opportunity matrix, test262, and third-party verifier gates

Batch publication of timestamped verification artifacts from automated
gate runs across nine verification tracks:

- extension_heavy_benchmark_spec (2 runs: 20260222, 20260223)
- flamegraph_pipeline (20260222)
- ga_release_delegate_guard (4 runs: 20260222)
- governance_scorecard (20260222)
- metamorphic (20260222)
- one_lever_policy (initial evidence)
- opportunity_matrix (initial evidence)
- test262_es2020_gate (2 runs: 20260223)
- third_party_verifier (initial evidence)

Each artifact directory contains run manifests, event logs, and/or
summary documents that form the auditable evidence chain for the
corresponding assurance gates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test extension_heavy_benchmark_spec --test extension_heavy_benchmark_matrix
+cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test extension_heavy_benchmark_spec --test extension_heavy_benchmark_matrix
+cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test extension_heavy_benchmark_spec --test extension_heavy_benchmark_matrix -- -D warnings
